one_line: Young revolutionary of the Hindustan Socialist Republican Association, standing trial after the 1929 Delhi Assembly bombing.

appearance.age_look: Early twenties, lean and wiry build, average height with a tense, coiled posture.
appearance.face: Oval face with a straight nose, medium-full lips, sharp cheekbones, light brown complexion; thin, neatly kept mustache; intense, thoughtful eyes with a calm, defiant default expression.
appearance.hair: Short, neatly combed black hair mostly hidden under a soft, light-brown felt fedora-style hat with a medium brim and simple dark band, worn slightly tilted to his right.
appearance.costume: Light, plain cotton kurta in off-white with a straight collar and thigh length; over it a well-fitted, single-breasted dark brown woolen coat (three buttons, notch lapel, mid-thigh length); simple off-white cotton trousers, slightly loose and straight; dark leather belt; dark brown lace-up leather shoes; no jewelry, keeping an austere, student-revolutionary look.
appearance.signature: A slim, well-worn dark brown leather-bound notebook held in his left hand and a simple steel fountain pen tucked in his right breast pocket, symbolizing his statements and writings.

ref_desc: Bhagat Singh is a lean early-twenties man with a light-brown oval face, thin mustache, short black hair under a tilted light-brown fedora, wearing an off-white kurta, dark-brown woolen coat, off-white trousers, dark-brown shoes, and carrying a brown notebook with a pen.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of Bhagat Singh as a dignified young Indian revolutionary in 1929: a lean early-twenties man with a light-brown oval face, sharp cheekbones, a thin neat mustache, and intense yet calm eyes, his short black hair mostly hidden under a soft light-brown fedora with a medium brim and a simple dark band tilted slightly to his right; dress him in an off-white plain cotton kurta with a straight collar, thigh length, under a fitted single-breasted dark-brown woolen coat with three buttons, notch lapels, and mid-thigh length, paired with simple off-white straight cotton trousers and dark-brown lace-up leather shoes, no jewelry; show a slim dark-brown leather notebook in his left hand and a simple steel fountain pen visible in his right breast pocket; present front, side, and back views in consistent colors and details, with a calm, steady, defiant expression that matches his austere student-revolutionary look.
